name: goal-foundry
description: Compile messy intent and project context into bounded, verifiable Codex /goal contracts with capability inventory, validation scripts, lifecycle hooks, and goal ledger artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Turn open-ended requests into finite Codex /goal contracts.
interface.longDescription: Goal Foundry inventories existing capabilities, discovers candidate goals, compiles frozen .goals/current.md contracts, renders paste-ready /goal objectives, captures evidence, protects frozen goal artifacts, and audits completed runs.
defaultPrompt: Use $authoring-goals to compile this raw request into .goals/current.md and a paste-ready /goal objective.
Use $authoring-goals to scan this repo area and create a launchable goals registry without executing anything.
Use $authoring-goals to audit the last Codex /goal run against .goals/current.md.
